profile.bio: Full-stack engineer passionate about building beautiful, accessible experiences.

evidence.text:
## # CV - Technical Abilities

# Alexander Bainbridge

📍 Pontypool, South Wales  
📧 [abainbridge89@gmail.com](mailto:abainbridge89@gmail.com) • 📱 07984 682330  
🔗 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alex-bainbridge-84a670116) • [GitHub](https://github.com/bain2236) • [Dev Blog](https://dev.to/bain_forge_games)

---
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text: I’m a technical lead and polyglot engineer with **10 years’ experience** building **cloud-native platforms**, leading **high-performing teams**, and delivering **AI-driven innovation**. Passionate about solving hard problems, mentoring engineers, and architecting scalable, future-ready systems.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text: ## 💼 Professional Experience
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text:
## **Clinithink** — *Technical Lead*  
*Jun 2023 – Present | Bridgend, Hybrid*

- Led a small team to architected and deliver **CustomerHub** in a quarter (ahead of schedule), re-platforming a legacy .NET/Azure app into **HubSpot CMS + React + Azure Functions**, **cutting deployment cycles by 75%**. .Net was new to me
- Built **BuildTools** — a PowerShell cmdlet suite and reusable **Azure DevOps pipeline templates** to standardise pipelines across the business. Provided necessary tooling for across the business, such as tracking our AI coding metrics, generating change logs, versioning, auto promotion of artifacts in **Azure Devops**
- Led **ProjectCipher**, an AI-driven experiment using **ML.NET + TypeScript + React** to evaluate one-shot full-stack generation.
- Mentored engineers and drove **psychological safety**, boosting delivery velocity and collaboration.
- Was a member of the Wellbeing team to promote openness and inclusivity
- Performed multiple demo's within our technical forum across a number of different projects and experiments
- A brief stay within the **CLiX Unlock** unlock teams, two crossfunctional teams who reported to a colleague as tech lead. I naturally re-positioned myself into a senior engineer role to support the lead.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text:
## **Clinithink** — *Software Engineer*  
*Jun 2021 – Jun 2023 | Bridgend, Hybrid*

- **CLiX Revenue**, an already established product **Python/Django/React** app surfacing NLP-powered insights. Django was new to me. Eventually led this team to became the **engineering benchmark** at Clinithink.
- Created Clinithink’s **first CI/CD pipeline** using **Terraform + Azure DevOps**, **cutting QA cycle times from days to hours**.
- Partnered with product owners and scrum masters to define features, improve agile processes, and coach peers on modern engineering practices.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text:
## **Raytheon** — *Senior Software Engineer*  
*Nov 2020 – Apr 2021 | Cheltenham*

- Built an **employee portal** using **React, Node.js, MySQL, Liquibase**, and **Docker**, deployed via **Jenkins + Kubernetes + Helm**.
- Improved test coverage and quality using **Jest, Cypress, and Cucumber**.
- Mentored junior engineers and influenced DevOps adoption across teams.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text:
## **BAE Systems Applied Intelligence** — *Software Engineer*  
*Aug 2016 – Nov 2020 | London & Cheltenham*

- Built a **distributed ETL framework** in **Python**, integrating **Kafka, Redis, Elasticsearch, and NiFi** to automate data processing.
- Designed CI/CD pipelines via **Ansible** and delivered robust testing suites using **Pytest**.
- Provided 24/7 support for critical client systems, resolving high-severity incidents under strict SLAs.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text:

evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text: I have worked with Alex on multiple projects at Clinithink (Client). He is a positive and a hard working person making it a delight to work with him. At any given time he was available to help and also took feedback in a positive manner, solving the problem for success. He has a great pick up speed for technologies making it easier for us to start on new problems quickly and wrap them up. Communication is another great quality which helps understand and solve the problem easily for the product. Great job Alex!
evidence.author: Amogh Madan

evidence.text: Collaborating with Alex for over four years has been an incredibly rewarding experience. He's one of those rare professionals who can seamlessly adapt to any technology stack, often mastering new tools and frameworks faster than expected. His proactive nature means he's always a step ahead—whether it's anticipating project needs, resolving blockers before they escalate, or volunteering to take on complex tasks others might shy away from. He's not just a tech expert—he's an all-rounder who brings energy, insight, and collaboration to every team interaction. If you're looking for someone who combines technical depth with a can-do attitude and a growth mindset, Alex is your person.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text: Alex is the man! Python .Net you name it he captures the essence of being a good developer agile and pluggable in almost any language, spent many of hours on troubleshooting sessions with him and trust me he is a resource you need to have in your tool chest!!
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text: I've been very lucky to work with Alex on 3 different products. Massively impressive ability to grasp new tech, concepts and tooling to achieve our product goals. Alex is innovative - always finding ways to evolve and improve on how product features get built. He is efficient, quickly grasps what product - or anyone else - needs - and turns out quality code to boot. I wouldn't hesitate at the opportunity to work with Alex again and would highly recommend him to any future employer.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text: I've worked with Alex for the past four years and can honestly say he's one of the best, most proactive, well-rounded engineers I've ever worked with. Whatever thing was thrown Alex's way, he tackled it with passion - from UX, UI/front-end design, backend design, CI/CD pipelines, nothing fazed him. Alex is comfortable using his initiative to learn the things and tools he doesn't know, but needs to know to get the job done. He is curious, inquisitive and gets stuff done to a high standard. None of this is evidenced more by his ability and experience throwing himself deep into using the latest AI engineering technology and tooling to make himself far more productive. Alex would be an asset for any engineering or modern product team.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text: Great experience working along with Alex. Always on to problem solving, fun refinements and code reviews, always available for discussion on technical tasks.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text: I've had the privilege of working closely with Alex, and I can confidently say he is one of the most dependable and knowledgeable professional I've worked with. As a Tech Lead and Full Stack Developer, he brings deep expertise in .NET Core, React, and Azure, combined with strong leadership qualities. What makes him special is his constant support and willingness to guide. He has got the ability to simplify complex problems, mentor team members, and drive projects to success with both technical excellence and collaboration. His calm approach under pressure and focus on delivering quality solutions have been a great source of learning and motivation for me. Any team would be fortunate to have him as a leader, mentor, and teammate.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text: I worked with Alex for just over 3 years. I found him to be very flexible and versatile in his approach to work, and he has a broad-range of knowledge across the software landscape. Alex was always happy to help me with my technical problems; nothing was too much trouble for him. I would be very happy to work with Alex again.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge

evidence.text:
# Example Wins

Joined a small python/react team in a new domain. Python was rusty and I had never worked with django. I quickly got up to speed.
Championed build tools, a collection of powershell modules and azure devops templates to facilitate re-use build pipeline tooling.
Led a team of offshore engineers to become the bar height of quality within engineering.
Demonstrated the value in adding static analysis to build pipelines which was quickly funded and integrated.
Built out the first CD pipeline using terraform. cutting QA time from minimum a day to minimum an hour.
Heavily contritubed to the tech forum, showcasing learnings, different prototypes and side projects.
Led a team using .Net with no useful (10 years of out date).Net experience. We delivered ahead of schedule on Release 1 and did 5 more releases within the following quarter
Managed the cultural differences with working with offshore engineers (India). (which was also a first)
Made good use of personal development on Friday afternoons to explore technologies even adding back into the product and company with new tools and capabilities.
Championed wellbeing and psycological safety by being a founding member of the internal wellbeing team.
Worked closely with the agile delivery lead to create high performing teams.
Worked closely with product owners to shape a more valuable product.
Adapted excellently to an AI-enabled engineer. Implemented internal AI usage tracking and reporting to gain insights. I Steered the use of AI in engineering to be more targeted, an approach that I am continuing to revel in.
evidence.author: Alex Bainbridge
